emails.subject: RE: Location Number
emails.body: Kevin, It's been a busy morning. I'll look these up ASAP. Mary To: Carriere, Frank; Hubbard, Mary

emails.subject: RE: Location Number
emails.body: I have a meeting with the customer Thursday morning, is it possible to have an answer by this afternoon?? To: Hyatt, Kevin

emails.subject: RE: Location Number
emails.body: Kevin, I just forwarded the data for the locations (14039,14225,24008) to Frank for review. He is currently in a meeting. However, I did not see any reference to a Gomez 20" pipe in those locations. Mary
